subheadline: A small, senior team across design, engineering, and support — most of us have shipped accessible products for a decade or more.

members.name: Lea Fischer
members.bio: Leads design systems and accessibility. Previously shaped the GOV.UK component library.

members.name: Mara Weiss
members.bio: Owns our component architecture and ships the design system to production weekly.

members.name: Noah Ritter
members.bio: Audits every release against WCAG 2.2 AA and runs our screen-reader testing.
